studies.title:
"MEMODIO_APP@CARE"
The first multi-domain app for people with mild cognitive impairment and mild dementia - a pilot study.

_verification.reason: The study title explicitly mentions 'MEMODIO_APP@CARE,' which directly matches the product name 'memodio.' Additionally, the study focuses on mild cognitive impairment and dementia, aligning with the clinical area of the product. No evidence suggests it is about a different product.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a pilot study, which often indicates an exploratory or observational design rather than a randomized controlled trial. No explicit RCT indicators such as randomization, blinding, or placebo control are mentioned.
